aiReceptionist.subtitle: 24/7 customer support, bookings, FAQs, and instant responses — powered by modern AI automation.
aiReceptionist.voiceIdle: Tap to talk to your AI
aiReceptionist.voiceUnsupported: Voice isn't supported in this browser — try Chrome
aiReceptionist.voiceError: Didn't catch that — tap to try again
aiReceptionist.voiceReplyBooking: I'd be glad to help you book! We have openings tomorrow at 2:00 PM and 4:30 PM. Tap 'Book a Free Consultation' below and our team will lock in your time.
aiReceptionist.voiceReplyHours: We're available 24/7 through this assistant! For a real consultation, tap 'Book a Free Consultation' below.
aiReceptionist.voiceReplyPricing: Great question! Pricing depends on your needs. Tap 'Book a Free Consultation' below for a custom quote — it's free.
aiReceptionist.voiceReplyDefault: Got it! I can help with that. Tap 'Book a Free Consultation' below and our team will take great care of you.

messages: Hi, do you have openings this Friday?
Yes! We have appointments at 2:00 PM and 4:30 PM. Which time works best for you?
4:30 PM please.
Perfect — your appointment has been reserved. Would you like a confirmation text message?
Appointment Confirmed
Do you have a table for 4 on Saturday night?
We do! 6:30 PM and 7:00 PM are open for a party of 4. Which would you prefer?
7:00 PM works great.
Wonderful — your table is booked for Saturday at 7:00 PM. We'll text you a reminder!
Reservation Confirmed
Can I get a deep cleaning next Monday morning?
Absolutely! We have 9:00 AM and 10:00 AM slots open Monday. Which works for you?
10:00 AM is perfect.
Great — your deep cleaning is scheduled for Monday at 10:00 AM. A confirmation is on its way!
Booking Confirmed
I need to book a cleaning this week.
Of course! We have Wednesday at 1:15 PM or Thursday at 9:00 AM available. Which suits you?
Wednesday 1:15 PM.
Perfect — you're booked for Wednesday at 1:15 PM. We'll send a reminder the day before!
Appointment Confirmed
Hi! Any color appointments open Friday?
Yes! We have 11:00 AM and 3:00 PM open for a full color & style. Which would you like?
11:00 AM please 💕
You're all set for Friday at 11:00 AM! A confirmation text is on the way.
Appointment Confirmed
